impacts.statement: Water approaches the road surface of the Old Highway 80 bridge.
Water approaches the under clearance of the Old Highway 80 bridge.
Water is close to entering some houses and camps just upstream of Old Highway 80 bridge on Hinds County side of the river.
Several hundred acres of agricultural land in western Hinds and eastern Warren counties are underwater.
Many houses and camps just upstream of old highway 80 bridge on Hinds County side of river are surrounded by water.
Water is across the road near the Old Highway 80 bridge. Extensive flooding of agricultural land is occurring. Several local access roads are also underwater.
Access roads to the river front area off of old highway 80 road near the bridge begin to flood.
Water begins to cover Warrior's Trail Road.
Several access roads along and near the river are under water.
Low-lying agricultural land near the river begins to flood.

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
